seo.title: Phone Repair Review Management Software | ReviewFlo

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Phone Repair
hero.subheading: A working screen feels normal in minutes. ReviewFlo asks right after the handoff when relief is still sharp.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Phone Repair Shop Faces

items.heading: Fixed phones stop feeling special fast
items.body: Customers tuck devices away and move on.

items.heading: Data loss fears explode into one-stars

items.heading: Mall kiosks are loud and fast

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Phone Repair Shops

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.
